title: Better Buttons UI!
description: Makes the buttons more modern. something that got made in Bedrock but wasn't transferred to Java.
body:
# Better Buttons UI!

The name says it all! This resource pack gives the buttons a cleaner touch using a "dark theme" and the new "Bedrock UI" Design!

Why stick around with the boring ol' buttons that vanilla has to offer you when this exists! You never know when you'll need dark buttons! 

![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a676aec58df45efee90c6f562cee2fc3c5a78b7f.png)
